ci_support_linux_64_r_base4.4.yaml:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
cran_mirror:
- https://cran.r-project.org
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
pin_run_as_build:
  r-base:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
r_base:
- '4.4'
target_platform:
- linux-64

about.summary: Manages a file system cache. Regular files can be moved or copied to the cache folder. Sub-folders can be created in order to organize the files. Files can be located inside the cache using a glob function. Text contents can be easily stored in and retrieved from the cache using dedicated functions. It can be used for an application or a package, as a global cache, or as a per-user cache, in which case the standard OS user cache folder will be used (e.g.: on Linux $HOME/.cache/R/my_app_or_pkg_cache_folder).

Manages a file system cache. Regular files can be moved or copied to the cache folder. Sub-folders can be created in order to organize the files. Files can be located inside the cache using a glob function. Text contents can be easily stored in and retrieved from the cache using dedicated functions. It can be used for an application or a package, as a global cache, or as a per-user cache, in which case the standard OS user cache folder will be used (e.g.: on Linux $HOME/.cache/R/my_app_or_pkg_cache_folder).

name: r-fscache
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set version = '1.0.5' %}
{% set posix = 'm2-' if win else '' %}

package:
  name: r-fscache
  version: {{ version|replace("-", "_") }}

source:
  url:
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/fscache_{{ version }}.tar.gz
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/Archive/fscache/fscache_{{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: bd083890fc5b6496dfb780ebf1bb80b6ddd0ecda956a0ac98ecf9f6394f92520

build:
  number: 0
  noarch: generic
  rpaths:
    - lib/R/lib/
    - lib/
  missing_dso_whitelist:
    - '*/R.dll'        # [win]
    - '*/Rblas.dll'    # [win]
    - '*/Rlapack.dll'  # [win]

requirements:
  build:
    - {{ posix }}zip               # [win]
    - cross-r-base {{ r_base }}    # [build_platform != target_platform]
  host:
    - r-base
    - r-r.utils
    - r-r6
    - r-chk
    - r-lgr
    - r-lifecycle
    - r-stringi
  run:
    - r-base
    - r-r.utils
    - r-r6
    - r-chk
    - r-lgr
    - r-lifecycle
    - r-stringi

test:
  commands:
    - $R -e "library('fscache')"           # [not win]
    - "\"%R%\" -e \"library('fscache')\""  # [win]

about:
  home: https://gitlab.com/cnrgh/databases/r-fscache
  license: AGPL-3.0-or-later
  summary: 'Manages a file system cache. Regular files can be moved or copied to the cache folder.
    Sub-folders can be created in order to organize the files. Files can be located
    inside the cache using a glob function. Text contents can be easily stored in and
    retrieved from the cache using dedicated functions. It can be used for an application
    or a package, as a global cache, or as a per-user cache, in which case the standard
    OS user cache folder will be used (e.g.: on Linux $HOME/.cache/R/my_app_or_pkg_cache_folder).'
  license_family: AGPL
  license_file:
    - '{{ environ["PREFIX"] }}/lib/R/share/licenses/AGPL-3'

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - conda-forge/r

# Package: fscache

Files can be located inside the cache using a glob function. Text contents can be easily stored in and retrieved from the cache using dedicated functions. It can be used for an application or a package, as a global cache, or as a per-user cache, in which case the standard OS user cache folder will be used (e.g.: on Linux $HOME/.cache/R/my_app_or_pkg_cache_folder).
